text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The afternoon rays of the early summer sun are shining through my
office window. Just as I'm about to clock out for the day, the door
opens.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is now a good moment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Entering through the door is my trainee, Mejiro Bright. If I recall, she
couldn't make it today because of some family matters...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. In fact, I'm currently waiting for an escort from the family
manor to come pick me up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: In the meantime, would it be okay if I waited here in your office?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. Well then, don't mind me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We've completely entered summer, haven't we? Our next day off is
sure to be perfect amusement park weather.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes. The other day, Father sent me tickets...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue idly chatting for a while. It feels nice to pass the time
together like this, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They are, aren't they? Still, I consider myself rather skilled at whiling
away the hours, so I think I'll wait for a little while longer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but you get off work early today, don't you? Will you be leaving
this office?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I do clock out earlier on days we don't train. But I'm not
about to kick out Bright and leave her all alone.
choice_data_list: Not yet. You're still here, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I appreciate it. Teehee, this reminds me of back then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Last winter, we also whiled away the time together like this, just the
two of us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, when you're by my side, I feel as if...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I become even more carefree than I usually am.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: DING-DONG, BING-BONG...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Oh, my... Has the sun already begun to set?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Forget clocking out early, at this point I'm going to start accumulating
overtime hours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it is rather rare for a Mejiro driver to be even more laid-back
than myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I shall call them to check—Oh? The screen has gone all dark.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She plugs in her phone to charge. After some time, the smartphone
lights up to show a few missed calls.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Driver
text_block_list.text:
"Excuse me, Miss Bright. Due to unexpected circumstances, today's
plans have been postponed to a later date."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Driver
text_block_list.text:
"My sincerest apologies, but you will no longer be required to leave
the academy grounds..."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...My, this message is from three hours ago. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I may have made you wait with me this whole time in vain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Bright not to worry. After all, I managed to finish up tomorrow's
paperwork, and it's my fault for not asking her to check her calls
earlier, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: If you're okay with it, then all is well. Still, I may have let myself be a little too relaxed in your office today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That isn't to say conversing with you today wasn't enjoyable...
choice_data_list: I had a fun time today, too.
I had a fun time today, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee, is that so? Then we'll leave it at that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...But are things really okay as they are?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun has already long set, but I'm glad I got to spend the day
together with Bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a split second, I see her unusually deep in thought. Thinking
nothing of it, I walk her back to her dormitory before clocking out for
the day.
